items.title: Vision 2030 Labor Pipeline

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: Over 17 years of building trust between Bangladesh and Saudi Arabia.

items.event: Established in Dhaka as a licensed manpower recruitment agency, laying the groundwork for trusted international partnerships.
Received official approval from the Saudi Government and successfully deployed our first batch of 300 skilled workers.
Opened our Jeddah office, strengthening our presence in Saudi Arabia and expanding into hospitality and healthcare sectors.
Achieved 2,500+ successful placements and launched our dedicated visa processing division to provide end-to-end solutions.
Founded our sister concern, KS Group, and diversified into comprehensive travel and mobility services.
Surpassed 5,000 successful placements and became an active partner in Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 initiative.

about.hero_sub: 17 years of integrity, excellence, and cross-border impact.
about.story:
Khandaker Industries LLC is built on a legacy that began in Bangladesh with KS Group, where our journey first took shape with a clear purpose: to create meaningful opportunities and deliver dependable business solutions.

Over the years, that foundation of trust, experience, and commitment has evolved into a dynamic international presence. Today, as a Saudi-approved LLC and a proud extension of KS Group, we operate with a strong focus on integrity, compliance, and excellence across every aspect of our services.

Our expertise spans the complete service cycle, from talent sourcing and skills verification to visa processing, travel coordination, and post-placement support. With operations connecting Bangladesh and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, we ensure every client receives reliable, efficient, and professional service, while every individual is supported with care and dignity.

Driven by experience and guided by values, we continue to grow as a trusted partner, delivering solutions that create lasting impact for both businesses and people.
about.leadership_intro_1: At Khandaker Industries LLC, our leadership team is the driving force behind our success, bringing together vision, experience, and a shared commitment to excellence. With a forward-thinking approach and strong ethical foundation, our leaders guide the organization toward sustainable growth, innovation, and long-term value creation.
about.leadership_intro_2: Their collective expertise across manpower, travel, and visa services ensures that we consistently deliver reliable solutions while maintaining the highest standards of professionalism. Through strategic direction and operational excellence, our leadership continues to strengthen our position as a trusted name in the industry.
about.commitment_intro: Together, our leadership team is committed to:
commitment_items: Building lasting relationships based on trust
Upholding the highest standards of integrity and professionalism
about.mission: To connect talent with opportunity by building a reliable bridge between Bangladesh and Saudi Arabia. We are committed to delivering ethical, transparent, and fully integrated manpower and travel solutions that meet global standards. Through professionalism, efficiency, and deep market understanding, we empower skilled individuals while supporting our partners with dependable workforce solutions tailored to their needs.
about.vision: To be the leading South Asian manpower and services company recognized across the Gulf for excellence, transparency, and the human dignity we uphold in every placement.

khondaker_shahjahan.name: Khandaker Shahjahan
khondaker_shahjahan.title: Managing Director
quote: As the Managing Director, Khandaker Shahjahan leads the organization with a clear vision and unwavering determination. His leadership is defined by strategic foresight, innovation, and a deep understanding of global business dynamics. Under his guidance, the company has expanded its capabilities and strengthened its market presence.

He is committed to building long-term partnerships, fostering trust, and delivering exceptional value to clients. His focus on sustainable growth and operational excellence continues to shape the future of Khandaker Industries LLC.

md_sohel_rana.name: Sohel Rana
md_sohel_rana.title: Director
quote: Sohel Rana plays a vital role in overseeing operations and ensuring consistent service quality across all sectors. With a strong commitment to efficiency and performance, he contributes to maintaining the company's high standards and client satisfaction.

His practical approach and dedication to excellence support the organization's mission to deliver reliable and professional services, reinforcing its reputation in both corporate and individual sectors.

md_muktar_husen.name: Md Muktar Hussen
md_muktar_husen.title: Director
quote: Md Muktar Hussen brings a results-oriented mindset and a focus on continuous improvement. His leadership supports the company's operational strength and growth initiatives, ensuring that every service meets client expectations.
With an emphasis on innovation, collaboration, and accountability, he plays a key role in transforming strategic goals into tangible outcomes, contributing to the company's ongoing success.

md_ziaur_rahman.name: Md Ziaur Rahman
md_ziaur_rahman.title: Director
quote: Md Ziaur Rahman provides valuable experience and insight that support the company's long-term vision. His commitment to integrity, trust, and disciplined growth helps guide the organization toward stability and sustained success.
He remains focused on strengthening client relationships and upholding the company's core values, ensuring that Khandaker Industries LLC continues to grow with confidence and credibility.

services_page.hero_sub: Comprehensive solutions for workforce, visa, and travel needs.

items.title: Manpower Supply
items.detail: We source, screen, skill-verify, and deploy workers across all sectors including construction, oil & gas, hospitality, healthcare, domestic services, and light manufacturing. Our rigorous pre-departure training ensures workers arrive job-ready.

items.title: Visa Processing
items.detail: We handle end-to-end visa processing — employment visas, family visit visas, business visas, Umrah visas, and Iqama renewals. Our team maintains real-time knowledge of Saudi immigration procedures to minimize processing time.

items.title: Travel Solutions
items.detail: From individual air tickets to coordinating group travel for 1,000+ pilgrims, our travel desk manages bookings, accommodation, travel insurance, and airport assistance with unmatched reliability.

items.title: Corporate HR Consulting
items.detail: For Saudi businesses and joint ventures, we offer strategic HR advisory, workforce planning, and compliance documentation — ensuring your operations meet Saudi Nitaqat and Saudization requirements.

contact.hero_sub: Reach our teams in Dhaka and Jeddah. We're here to help.
contact.form_success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
